TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_James_Anderson_(American_actor), title = James_Anderson_(American_actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Anderson_(American_actor)} }

S.FORM: James Anderson kawas tay 1921, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 7, James Anderson , squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1969) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
James Anderson kawas tay 1921, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 7, James Anderson , squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1969) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *ames~ɕ an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ames~ɕ an*ers~ɕon , s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
